sequenceDiagram(name = "User Login") {
    val user = lifeline(name = "User") { isActor = true }
    val loginInterface = lifeline(name = "Login Interface")
    val authService = lifeline(name = "Authentication Service")
    val userDB = lifeline(name = "User Database")

    message(from = user, to = loginInterface, label = "enters credentials")

    reply(from = authService, to = loginInterface, label = "accessToken")

}

@startuml
actor Buyer
participant "Web Shop" as Shop
participant "Search Service" as Search
participant "Product Catalog" as Catalog

Buyer -> Shop : Enter search term
Shop -> Search : Search(term)
Search -> Catalog : Find products(term)
Catalog --> Search : Product list
Search --> Shop : Results list

alt results found
    Shop -> Catalog : Load product images(product IDs)
    Catalog --> Shop : Product images
end

Shop --> Buyer : Display results page
@enduml

edges: Buyer -> Web Shop : enters search term (message)
Web Shop -> Search Service : pass search term (message)
Search Service -> Product Catalog : find matching products (message)
Product Catalog -> Search Service : matching products list (reply)
Search Service -> Web Shop : results list (reply)
Web Shop -> Product Catalog : load associated product images (message)
Product Catalog -> Web Shop : product images (reply)
Web Shop -> Buyer : display results page (reply)
finalCode:
sequenceDiagram(name = "Product Search Flow") {
    val buyer = lifeline(name = "Buyer") { isActor = true }
    val webShop = lifeline(name = "Web Shop")
    val searchService = lifeline(name = "Search Service")
    val productCatalog = lifeline(name = "Product Catalog")
    message(from = buyer, to = webShop, label = "enters search term")
    message(from = webShop, to = searchService, label = "pass search term")
    message(from = searchService, to = productCatalog, label = "find matching products")
    reply(from = productCatalog, to = searchService, label = "matching products list")
    reply(from = searchService, to = webShop, label = "results list")
    message(from = webShop, to = productCatalog, label = "load associated product images")
    reply(from = productCatalog, to = webShop, label = "product images")
    reply(from = webShop, to = buyer, label = "display results page")
}

sequenceDiagram
  actor Buyer
  participant WebShop
  participant SearchService
  participant ProductCatalog

  Buyer->>WebShop: enters search term
  WebShop->>SearchService: search(term)
  SearchService->>ProductCatalog: findMatchingProducts(term)
  ProductCatalog-->>SearchService: matching products
  SearchService-->>WebShop: results list

  alt Results found
    WebShop->>ProductCatalog: loadAssociatedImages(product IDs)
    ProductCatalog-->>WebShop: product images
    WebShop->>Buyer: displays results page
  else No results found
    WebShop->>Buyer: displays "No results" page
  end

@startuml
actor Customer
participant Shop
participant "Checkout Service"
participant "Payment Gateway"
participant Database

Customer -> Shop : initiate checkout
Shop -> "Checkout Service" : request checkout (payment details)
"Checkout Service" -> "Payment Gateway" : verify payment details
"Payment Gateway" --> "Checkout Service" : verification result

alt Payment details valid
    "Checkout Service" -> Database : save order
    Database --> "Checkout Service" : order saved (ID)
    "Checkout Service" -> "Payment Gateway" : process payment
    "Payment Gateway" --> "Checkout Service" : payment confirmation
    "Checkout Service" --> Shop : checkout successful
    Shop --> Customer : display success message
else Payment details invalid
    "Checkout Service" --> Shop : reject checkout (error message)
    Shop --> Customer : display error message
end
@enduml

edges: Shop- -> Customer : display successful checkout result (message)
finalCode:
sequenceDiagram
  actor Customer
  participant Shop
  participant Checkout Service
  participant Payment Gateway
  participant Database

  Customer->>Shop: initiates checkout
  Shop->>Checkout Service: verify payment details

  Checkout Service->>Payment Gateway: verify stored payment details
  Payment Gateway-->>Checkout Service: verification result

  alt If check is positive
    Checkout Service->>Database: save order
    Database-->>Checkout Service: order saved
    Checkout Service->>Payment Gateway: process payment
    Payment Gateway-->>Checkout Service: payment processed
    Checkout Service-->>Shop: confirm successful checkout
    Shop-->>Customer: display successful checkout result
  else If payment details are invalid
    Checkout Service-->>Shop: reject with error message
    Shop-->>Customer: display error message
  end

edges: Shop -> Checkout Service : verify payment details (message)
Checkout Service -> Payment Gateway : verify payment details (message)
Payment Gateway -> Checkout Service : details valid (reply)
Checkout Service -> Payment Gateway : process payment (message)
Payment Gateway -> Checkout Service : payment processed (reply)
finalCode:
sequenceDiagram(name = "Checkout Process") {
    val customer = lifeline(name = "Customer") { isActor = true }
    val shop = lifeline(name = "Shop")
    val checkoutService = lifeline(name = "Checkout Service")
    val paymentGateway = lifeline(name = "Payment Gateway")
    val database = lifeline(name = "Database")

    message(from = customer, to = shop, label = "initiate checkout")
    message(from = shop, to = checkoutService, label = "verify payment details")
    message(from = checkoutService, to = paymentGateway, label = "verify payment details")
    reply(from = paymentGateway, to = checkoutService, label = "details valid")
    message(from = checkoutService, to = database, label = "save order")
    reply(from = database, to = checkoutService, label = "order saved")
    message(from = checkoutService, to = paymentGateway, label = "process payment")
    reply(from = paymentGateway, to = checkoutService, label = "payment processed")
    reply(from = checkoutService, to = shop, label = "checkout successful")
    reply(from = shop, to = customer, label = "checkout result displayed")
}

edges: API Gateway -> Rate Limiter : Check Quota (message)
Rate Limiter -> API Gateway : Quota Exhausted (reply)
API Gateway -> Client : Reject: Too Many Requests (reply)
API Gateway -> Rate Limiter : Check Quota (message)
Rate Limiter -> API Gateway : Quota Exhausted (reply)
API Gateway -> Client : Reject: Too Many Requests (reply)
API Gateway -> Rate Limiter : Check Quota (message)
Rate Limiter -> API Gateway : Quota Available (reply)
API Gateway -> Backend Service : Forward Request (message)
finalCode:
sequenceDiagram(name = "ClientDataRequestFlow") {
    val client = lifeline(name = "Client") { isActor = true }
    val apiGateway = lifeline(name = "API Gateway")
    val rateLimiter = lifeline(name = "Rate Limiter")
    val backendService = lifeline(name = "Backend Service")

    // Initial request - Path 1: Rejection
    message(from = client, to = apiGateway, label = "Request Data")
    message(from = apiGateway, to = rateLimiter, label = "Check Quota")
    reply(from = rateLimiter, to = apiGateway, label = "Quota Exhausted")
    reply(from = apiGateway, to = client, label = "Reject: Too Many Requests")

    // Client waits and retries - Retry 1: Still Rejected
    message(from = client, to = apiGateway, label = "Request Data (Retry 1)")
    message(from = apiGateway, to = rateLimiter, label = "Check Quota")
    reply(from = rateLimiter, to = apiGateway, label = "Quota Exhausted")
    reply(from = apiGateway, to = client, label = "Reject: Too Many Requests")

    // Client waits and retries - Retry 2: Success
    message(from = client, to = apiGateway, label = "Request Data (Retry 2)")
    message(from = apiGateway, to = rateLimiter, label = "Check Quota")
    reply(from = rateLimiter, to = apiGateway, label = "Quota Available")
    message(from = apiGateway, to = backendService, label = "Forward Request")
    reply(from = backendService, to = apiGateway, label = "Data")
    reply(from = apiGateway, to = client, label = "Data")
}

  actor Customer

  Customer->>OrderService: placeOrder()
  OrderService->>SagaOrchestrator: instantiateSaga()

  SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: logEvent("sagaStarted")

  SagaOrchestrator->>WarehouseService: reserveItems()
  WarehouseService-->>SagaOrchestrator: itemsReserved(isAvailable)

  alt itemsAvailable
    SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: logEvent("itemsReserved")

    PaymentService-->>SagaOrchestrator: paymentResult(isSuccess)

      SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: logEvent("paymentSuccessful")

      ShipmentService-->>SagaOrchestrator: shipmentCommissioned()

      SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: logEvent("shipmentCommissioned")

      SagaOrchestrator->>OrderService: notifyOrderCompleted(success)
      OrderService->>SagaOrchestrator: tearDownSaga()
      OrderService->>Customer: informOrderStatus(success)
    else paymentFailed
      SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: logEvent("paymentFailed")

      SagaOrchestrator->>WarehouseService: cancelReservation()
      WarehouseService-->>SagaOrchestrator: reservationCancelled()

      SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: logEvent("reservationCancelled")

      OrderService->>SagaOrchestrator: tearDownSaga()
      OrderService->>Customer: informOrderStatus(failure)
    end

    OrderService->>SagaOrchestrator: tearDownSaga()
    OrderService->>Customer: informOrderStatus(failure)
  end

@startuml
actor Customer
participant OrderService
participant SagaOrchestrator
participant EventLog
participant WarehouseService
participant PaymentService
participant ShipmentService

Customer -> OrderService : placeOrder()
activate OrderService

OrderService -> SagaOrchestrator : instantiateSaga()
activate SagaOrchestrator

SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : logStep(saga_started)

SagaOrchestrator -> WarehouseService : reserveItems()
activate WarehouseService

alt Items are available
    WarehouseService --> SagaOrchestrator : itemsReserved()
    deactivate WarehouseService

    SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : logStep(items_reserved)

    SagaOrchestrator -> PaymentService : processPayment()
    activate PaymentService

    alt Payment successful
        PaymentService --> SagaOrchestrator : paymentSuccessful()
        deactivate PaymentService

        SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : logStep(payment_successful)

        SagaOrchestrator -> ShipmentService : commissionShipment()
        activate ShipmentService
        ShipmentService --> SagaOrchestrator : shipmentCommissioned()
        deactivate ShipmentService

        SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : logStep(shipment_commissioned)
        SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : logStep(order_completed)

        SagaOrchestrator --> OrderService : orderCompleted()

    else Payment failed
        PaymentService --> SagaOrchestrator : paymentFailed()
        deactivate PaymentService

        SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : logStep(payment_failed)

        SagaOrchestrator -> WarehouseService : cancelReservation()
        activate WarehouseService
        WarehouseService --> SagaOrchestrator : reservationCancelled()
        deactivate WarehouseService

        SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : logStep(reservation_cancelled_compensation)
        SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : logStep(order_failed)

        SagaOrchestrator --> OrderService : orderFailed(payment)

    end

else Items are not available
    WarehouseService --> SagaOrchestrator : itemsNotAvailable()
    deactivate WarehouseService

    SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : logStep(items_not_available)
    SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : logStep(order_aborted)

    SagaOrchestrator --> OrderService : orderAborted(noItems)

end

destroy SagaOrchestrator

OrderService --> Customer : orderStatus(final)
deactivate OrderService
@enduml

@startuml
actor User
participant "Client App" as Client
participant Browser
participant "Authorization Server" as AuthServer
participant "Session Store" as SessionStore
participant "Audit Log" as AuditLog
participant "Resource Server" as ResourceServer

User -> Client : initiates login
Client -> Browser : redirect to AuthServer
Browser -> AuthServer : request login form

AuthServer -> SessionStore : create new session
SessionStore --> AuthServer : session ID

AuthServer --> Browser : delivers login form
Browser --> User : displays login form

User -> Browser : enters credentials
Browser -> AuthServer : submit credentials

alt Successful verification
    AuthServer --> Browser : redirect with authorization code
    Browser -> Client : callback with authorization code

    Client -> AuthServer : exchange authorization code for access token
    AuthServer --> Client : access token

    par Concurrent Audit Logging
        AuthServer -> AuditLog : log token issuance
    end

    alt Requested scope includes profile
        Client -> ResourceServer : get user data (with access token)
        ResourceServer -> AuthServer : verify access token
        AuthServer --> ResourceServer : token valid
        ResourceServer --> Client : user profile data
    end

else Wrong credentials
    AuthServer -> SessionStore : discard session
    SessionStore --> AuthServer : session discarded
    AuthServer --> Browser : error message
    Browser --> User : displays error message
end
@enduml

  participant Session Store
  participant Audit Log

    Auth Server->>Audit Log: log access token issuance
    Audit Log-->>Auth Server: logged

    opt Scope includes profile

      Resource Server->>Auth Server: verify access token
      Auth Server-->>Resource Server: token valid
      Resource Server-->>Client App: user profile data
      Client App-->>User: display profile
    end

  else Wrong Credentials
    Auth Server->>Auth Server: verify credentials (failure)
    Auth Server->>Session Store: discard session
    Session Store-->>Auth Server: session discarded
    Auth Server-->>Client App: error message
    Client App-->>User: error message

sequenceDiagram
  participant Camera Sensor
  participant Radar Sensor
  participant Fusion Unit
  participant Emergency Braking Assistant
  actor Driver
  participant Control Unit
  participant Diagnostic Log

  par Data Acquisition
    Camera Sensor->Fusion Unit: measurementData
    Radar Sensor->Fusion Unit: measurementData
  end

  Fusion Unit->>Emergency Braking Assistant: reportCollisionRisk(timeToCollision)
  Emergency Braking Assistant-->>Fusion Unit: riskReceived

  alt timeToCollision < criticalThreshold
    Emergency Braking Assistant->>Driver: warnAcoustically()
    Driver-->>Emergency Braking Assistant: warningAcknowledged

    Emergency Braking Assistant->>Control Unit: initiateBrakingManeuver()
    Control Unit-->>Emergency Braking Assistant: maneuverStarted

    loop until vehicle stationary
      Emergency Braking Assistant->>Control Unit: adjustBrakePressure()
      Control Unit-->>Emergency Braking Assistant: pressureAdjusted
    end

    Emergency Braking Assistant->>Control Unit: endBrakingManeuver()
    Control Unit-->>Emergency Braking Assistant: maneuverEnded

    Emergency Braking Assistant->>Diagnostic Log: recordEvent(collisionEventDetails)
    Diagnostic Log-->>Emergency Braking Assistant: eventRecorded
  else timeToCollision >= criticalThreshold
    par Display Warning and Log Risk
      Emergency Braking Assistant->>Driver: showDistanceWarning()
      Driver-->>Emergency Braking Assistant: warningDisplayed
    and
      Emergency Braking Assistant->>Diagnostic Log: logObservedRisk(riskDetails)
      Diagnostic Log-->>Emergency Braking Assistant: riskLogged
    end
  end

@startuml
actor Driver
participant Camera
participant Radar
participant FusionUnit as "Fusion Unit"
participant Assistant as "Emergency Braking Assistant"
participant ControlUnit as "Control Unit"
participant DiagnosticLog as "Diagnostic Log"

par "Sensor Data Acquisition"
    Camera -> FusionUnit : sendMeasurementData()
    Radar -> FusionUnit : sendMeasurementData()
end

activate FusionUnit
note over FusionUnit : Computes consolidated environment model
FusionUnit -> Assistant : reportCollisionRisk(ttc)
deactivate FusionUnit

activate Assistant
alt ttc < criticalThreshold
    Assistant -> Driver : warnAcoustically()
    Assistant -> ControlUnit : initiateBraking()
    activate ControlUnit
    loop until vehicle stationary
        Assistant -> ControlUnit : adjustBrakePressure()
        ControlUnit --> Assistant : vehicleSpeed(currentSpeed)
    end
    Assistant -> ControlUnit : endBrakingManeuver()
    deactivate ControlUnit
    Assistant -> DiagnosticLog : recordBrakingEvent(ttc)
else ttc >= criticalThreshold
    Assistant -> Driver : showDistanceWarning()
    Assistant -> DiagnosticLog : logObservedRisk(ttc)
end
deactivate Assistant
@enduml

Earth Observation Satellite -> Electrical Power Subsystem (composition)
finalCode:
import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model

sysml2Model(name = "EarthObservationSatelliteModel") {
    // Declare all base components first
    val primaryStructure = partDef(name = "Primary Structure")
    val solarPanels = partDef(name = "Solar Panels")
    val heatShield = partDef(name = "Heat Shield")

    val batteryArray = partDef(name = "Battery Array")
    val solarPowerRegulator = partDef(name = "Solar Power Regulator")
    val pdu = partDef(name = "PDU") // Power Distribution Unit

    val starSensor = partDef(name = "Star Sensor")
    val reactionWheels = partDef(name = "Reaction Wheels")
    val thrusters = partDef(name = "Thrusters")

    val onboardComputer = partDef(name = "On-board Computer")
    val rfTransmitter = partDef(name = "RF Transmitter")
    val rfReceiver = partDef(name = "RF Receiver")

    // Declare abstract payload instrument (without unsupported 'abstract' keyword)
    val payloadInstrument = partDef(name = "Payload Instrument")

    // Declare specific payload instruments (without unsupported 'isSpecializationOf' keyword)
    val opticalCamera = partDef(name = "Optical Camera")
    val sarRadar = partDef(name = "SAR Radar")

    // Declare subsystems, composing their respective components
    val payloadSubsystem = partDef(name = "Payload Subsystem") {
        part(name = "opticalCamera", typeId = opticalCamera.id)
        part(name = "sarRadar", typeId = sarRadar.id)
    }

    val structureThermalSubsystem = partDef(name = "Structure & Thermal Subsystem") {
        part(name = "primaryStructure", typeId = primaryStructure.id)
        part(name = "solarPanels", typeId = solarPanels.id)
        part(name = "heatShield", typeId = heatShield.id)
    }

    val electricalPowerSubsystem = partDef(name = "Electrical Power Subsystem") {
        part(name = "batteryArray", typeId = batteryArray.id)
        part(name = "solarPowerRegulator", typeId = solarPowerRegulator.id)
        part(name = "pdu", typeId = pdu.id)
    }

    val aocsSubsystem = partDef(name = "AOCS Subsystem") {
        part(name = "starSensor", typeId = starSensor.id)
        part(name = "reactionWheels", typeId = reactionWheels.id)
        part(name = "thrusters", typeId = thrusters.id)
    }

    val ttcSubsystem = partDef(name = "TT&C Subsystem") {
        part(name = "onboardComputer", typeId = onboardComputer.id)
        part(name = "rfTransmitter", typeId = rfTransmitter.id)
        part(name = "rfReceiver", typeId = rfReceiver.id)
    }

    // Declare the main Satellite system, composing all subsystems
    val satellite = partDef(name = "Earth Observation Satellite") {
        part(name = "payloadSubsystem", typeId = payloadSubsystem.id)
        part(name = "structureThermalSubsystem", typeId = structureThermalSubsystem.id)
        part(name = "electricalPowerSubsystem", typeId = electricalPowerSubsystem.id)
        part(name = "aocsSubsystem", typeId = aocsSubsystem.id)
        part(name = "ttcSubsystem", typeId = ttcSubsystem.id)
    }

    // Block Definition Diagram to render all defined partDefs
    bdd(name = "Earth Observation Satellite BDD") {
        include(satellite)
        include(payloadSubsystem)
        include(structureThermalSubsystem)
        include(electricalPowerSubsystem)
        include(aocsSubsystem)
        include(ttcSubsystem)
        include(payloadInstrument)
        include(opticalCamera)
        include(sarRadar)
        include(primaryStructure)
        include(solarPanels)
        include(heatShield)
        include(batteryArray)
        include(solarPowerRegulator)
        include(pdu)
        include(starSensor)
        include(reactionWheels)
        include(thrusters)
        include(onboardComputer)
        include(rfTransmitter)
        include(rfReceiver)
    }
}

import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model

sysml2Model(name = "AutonomousVehicleSystem") {
    // Abstract Perception Sensor
    val perceptionSensor = partDef(name = "Perception Sensor")

    // 1. Perception Subsystem components
    val cameraCluster = partDef(name = "Camera Cluster")
    val radarArray = partDef(name = "Radar Array")
    val lidarScanner = partDef(name = "Lidar Scanner")
    val gpsIns = partDef(name = "GPS/INS")
    val perception = partDef(name = "Perception") {
        part(name = "cameras", typeId = cameraCluster.id)
        part(name = "radars", typeId = radarArray.id)
        part(name = "lidars", typeId = lidarScanner.id)
        part(name = "gpsIns", typeId = gpsIns.id)
    }

    // 2. Processing Platform Subsystem components
    val gpu = partDef(name = "GPU")
    val cpu = partDef(name = "CPU")
    val dram = partDef(name = "DRAM")
    val avCompute = partDef(name = "AV Compute") {
        part(name = "gpu", typeId = gpu.id)
        part(name = "cpu", typeId = cpu.id)
        part(name = "dram", typeId = dram.id)
    }
    val safetyMonitoringComputer = partDef(name = "Safety Monitoring Computer")
    val processingPlatform = partDef(name = "Processing Platform") {
        part(name = "avCompute", typeId = avCompute.id)
        part(name = "safetyMonitor", typeId = safetyMonitoringComputer.id)
    }

    // 3. Localization and Mapping Subsystem components
    val hdMapUnit = partDef(name = "HD Map Unit")
    val realTimeLocalizationModule = partDef(name = "Real-Time Localization Module")
    val localizationAndMapping = partDef(name = "Localization and Mapping") {
        part(name = "hdMap", typeId = hdMapUnit.id)
        part(name = "localization", typeId = realTimeLocalizationModule.id)
    }

    // 4. Driving Decision and Planning Subsystem components
    val pathPlanningModule = partDef(name = "Path Planning Module")
    val behaviorDecisionModule = partDef(name = "Behavior Decision Module")
    val drivingDecisionAndPlanning = partDef(name = "Driving Decision and Planning") {
        part(name = "pathPlanner", typeId = pathPlanningModule.id)
        part(name = "behavior", typeId = behaviorDecisionModule.id)
    }

    // 5. Vehicle Control Subsystem components
    val steerByWireUnit = partDef(name = "Steer-by-Wire Unit")
    val brakeByWireUnit = partDef(name = "Brake-by-Wire Unit")
    val driveControl = partDef(name = "Drive Control")
    val vehicleControl = partDef(name = "Vehicle Control") {
        part(name = "steer", typeId = steerByWireUnit.id)
        part(name = "brake", typeId = brakeByWireUnit.id)
        part(name = "drive", typeId = driveControl.id)
    }

    // 6. Communication Subsystem components
    val v2xModule = partDef(name = "V2X Module")
    val telematicsModule = partDef(name = "Telematics Module")
    val communication = partDef(name = "Communication") {
        part(name = "v2x", typeId = v2xModule.id)
        part(name = "telematics", typeId = telematicsModule.id)
    }

    // Top-level Autonomous Vehicle system
    val autonomousVehicle = partDef(name = "Autonomous Vehicle") {
        part(name = "perceptionSys", typeId = perception.id)
        part(name = "processingSys", typeId = processingPlatform.id)
        part(name = "localizationSys", typeId = localizationAndMapping.id)
        part(name = "decisionSys", typeId = drivingDecisionAndPlanning.id)
        part(name = "controlSys", typeId = vehicleControl.id)
        part(name = "communicationSys", typeId = communication.id)
    }

    bdd(name = "Autonomous Vehicle BDD") {
        include(autonomousVehicle)
        include(perception)
        include(perceptionSensor)
        include(cameraCluster)
        include(radarArray)
        include(lidarScanner)
        include(gpsIns)
        include(processingPlatform)
        include(avCompute)
        include(gpu)
        include(cpu)
        include(dram)
        include(safetyMonitoringComputer)
        include(localizationAndMapping)
        include(hdMapUnit)
        include(realTimeLocalizationModule)
        include(drivingDecisionAndPlanning)
        include(pathPlanningModule)
        include(behaviorDecisionModule)
        include(vehicleControl)
        include(steerByWireUnit)
        include(brakeByWireUnit)
        include(driveControl)
        include(communication)
        include(v2xModule)
        include(telematicsModule)
    }
}
